title: Shoals Technologies Group Partners with ON.energy for AI Data Center Opportunities Backed by Record Backlog
text: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHLS) announced a partnership with ON.energy on February 26, focused on deploying multiple gigawatts of critical power systems into the AI data center sector. The collaboration addresses the surging demand for dependable power infrastructure as artificial intelligence and cloud computing expand data center operations. CEO Brandon Moss stated: As AI and cloud computing drive unprecedented growth in energy demand, data centers are under pressure to secure long-term, reliable power, rapidly and at scale. The partnership comes during a period of exceptional growth for Shoals. The company achieved remarkable results in 2025: Record backlog with awarded orders totaling $747.6 million, Q4 revenue climbed 39% to $148.3 million, Full-year revenue reached $475.3 million (up 19%), Net income increased to $33.6 million from $24.1 million year-over-year. Shoals plans to scale production capacity by expanding into a 638,000-square-foot manufacturing facility in Portland, enabling the company to meet growing demand from utility-scale solar projects and now the emerging data center market. The partnership with ON.energy represents a significant step forward in Shoals' strategic expansion beyond its core solar business.
